text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The shopping district is surprisingly crowded on
our way back from running errands.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hm? I wonder what all the excitement is about
over there...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
They're giving out deluxe carrot hamburger
steaks?! Trainer, we have to try this raffle out!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! We need tickets! Hmm... I know! I'll go
do a little shopping!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! I think I bought too much. There are so
many dishes I wanna make if we win carrots.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Okay, here I go! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono gives the raffle machine a
powerful spin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: O-o-oh my gosh! I won the vacation ticket!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: And it's for this inn?! They're famous for serving really buono food!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
This is amazing! We should go on this trip
together, Trainer!
choice_data_list: You want me to go with you?
You want me to go with you?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Of course! ☆ Just imagine how great it'll be,
getting to eat such yummy food together!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh... but we don't really have time to go now, do
we? I still have so many races to run...
choice_data_list: How about we go once things calm down?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That's a good idea. We'll be able to relax better if
we don't have to worry about my schedule!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's wait for now. I'll take good care of
the ticket until then.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! I wonder what they'll serve? Sashimi?
Steak? Hot pot, maybe?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Whatever it is, I'm sure there'll be lots to learn
from the different flavors! I'll have to memorize
how the food tastes for reference!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
We've got to make sure we're nice and hungry
when we go! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Hishi Akebono and I make a brand-new
promise with each other.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Wooow! It looks delicious!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Wait... Is this... Oh, it is! This is the
hamburger steak they serve at a really famous
restaurant!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I've been wanting to eat there someday. What an
incredible twist of fate!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Thank you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: You should have it with me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Sharing food makes it taste twice as
delicious!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: And sharing it with someone you really like makes it four times as yummy! Amazing, right?
choice_data_list: Well, I can't say no to that!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Good answer! Now let's go home!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Since I bought so many ingredients, I'll make us
soup and salad for sides too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After we get home, we enjoy the mouthwateringly
delicious deluxe carrot hamburger steak together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono manages to reverse-engineer the
steak's recipe and recreate it exactly a few days
later... but that's a story for another time.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yay, I did it! I can make sooo much with these!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I can make meat and potatoes, curry, stew, carrot
hamburger steaks, carrot steaks, salads and, oh!
Cake and jelly too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You'd better get ready for dinner tonight,
because I'm going to make sure your heart will be
as full and happy and as your tummy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm honored that she's so enthusiastic to cook for
me, but I don't think the two of us can realistically
eat all these carrots.
choice_data_list: I don't think we can finish these alone.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, good point! It would've been bad if we ended
up with a bunch of leftovers.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I've got an idea! I'll try to invite some
others to join us!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Maya! I was thinking about throwing a carrot
party for everybody today. Do you think you can
come?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Great! ♪ I'm glad you can make it! See you then!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yay, she agreed to come! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Next, I just have to ask Curren, Biko, and
Kawakami. I wonder if Fuji and Hishiama can
make it too?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Haha! This is exciting! I can't wait! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Dinner that night is much livelier than usual.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Aw man, I was so close! Still, this carrot looks real
tasty! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's a bit thin but it's got some heft, and its roots
are so evenly spaced! I bet it'll turn out soft and
sweet once it's cooked!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: And to make the most of this carrot...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'll simmer it with some other ingredients in soy
sauce and make a super buono dish out of it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, I'm treated to the delicately
simmered dish she makes, and true to her word,
it's absolutely buono.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Don't be shy if you want seconds! There's plenty
more to have! ☆

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh... What a shame!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Aww... I was really looking forward to making a
grand and buono feast for dinner too...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh well! I'm sure these veggies I bought will make
just a good a dinner!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Some days just don't go your way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's clearly trying to stay positive, but her
expression is a little downcast when we leave the
shopping district together.
